summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was invented, no GitHub mutations are proposed, and every candidate is kept as an independent PR because the job blocks merge/fix, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the hydrated evidence does not prove a boring duplicate/superseded close path.

actions.reason: Docs-only low-signal candidate is not closable in this run because low-signal closeout is disabled and no canonical replacement is hydrated.
Useful scoped Docker/runtime PR remains independent; conflicts block merge-only handling, not classification.
Feature PR has unique product scope and needs normal author/maintainer review outside this inventory cleanup.
Broad contributor PR with conflicts and unresolved proof/review evidence is not a safe close, merge, or replacement candidate in plan mode.
Channel-specific behavior fix remains independent and blocked from merge/close decisions by proof and conflict state.
Small plugin CLI fix is not closable or mergeable from this inventory plan with failing checks.
Focused browser hardening PR has unique scope; merge is blocked by job policy, so keep as independent.
Narrow hardening/parity cleanup does not show a central-security boundary-bypass claim in hydrated evidence and remains independent.
Feature PR needs proof/product review and is not eligible for automated closure in this plan.
Exec-adjacent hardening PR remains independent; lack of hydrated review/comment detail blocks merge-style planning, not classification.
Draft PR has unique bug-fix scope but needs author cleanup/proof before any maintainer action.
Focused perf PR remains a standalone candidate for maintainer review.
Config compatibility fix is independent and still draft/proof-blocked.
Priority bug-fix PR has unique scope and should stay open for proof/maintainer review.
Large session-state PR remains independent and requires maintainer/author follow-up outside cleanup automation.
Maintainer-owned focused bug fix should stay open; conflicts block only merge handling.
Maintainer/member PR has unique UI scope and needs normal review; no closure action is safe.
Diagnostics hardening PR is independent and conflict-blocked only for merge.
Memory-core availability PR has unique scope and should remain open for maintainer conflict/review handling.
Focused agents PR remains independent; failing check and conflicts block merge but not classification.
Docs/process PR is not eligible for low-signal closeout because that drive plan is disabled.
Provider/model fallback bug has unique behavior scope and should remain open for proof/review.
SecretRef handling PR is independent and needs maintainer review; no security routing is required from the provided evidence.
Small browser cleanup remains independent; proof is still requested and closeout is not enabled.
Session/auth-provider bug fix has unique scope and should remain open for maintainer review.
High-priority Codex behavior fix remains an independent maintainer-review candidate.
Focused cron/CLI behavior fix remains independent.
Provider capability fix is not duplicate-cleanup work and still needs real proof.
New provider feature has unique product scope and remains open for author/maintainer review.
Slack feature PR is independent and proof-blocked, not safe for automated closeout.
ACP/runtime compatibility fix has unique scope and needs proof.
Channel media feature/fix remains independent and requires maintainer review.
Multi-bug PR should remain open for maintainer scoping/proof rather than automated cleanup.
Large external-plugin feature candidate remains independent and needs maintainer review.
Likely low-signal/template PR is not eligible for closeout in this run.
Replacement/repair PR remains independent for maintainer review; no merge or close plan can be emitted here.
Provider/tool-call parsing PR has unique behavior scope and remains open for author/maintainer review.
Maintainer-owned untested draft work should stay open and is not backlog closeout.
New provider PR is independent and needs maintainer proof/dependency review.
Credential contract PR remains independent and should stay open for maintainer review.
